_comment: Expected `next build` render mode for every route, asserted by scripts/assert-route-classification.mjs after a build. Guards the conversion-track payoff (3.0.4.8+3.0.4.9): a route must not silently regress to a more dynamic mode. Modes: 'static' = O (fully prerendered), 'partial' = (partial prerender — static shell + request-time <Suspense> holes), 'dynamic' = f (server-rendered per request). New routes must be added here or the check fails. If a change is intentional, update this file in the same commit.

_reasons./: Transient auth_error query param renders in a Suspense dynamic hole; hero + tiles are static.
_reasons./sites: searchParams-driven filtered list + live-price overlay stream from a dynamic hole.
_reasons./sites/[id]: Per-site detail (params + DB + live prices) streams from a dynamic hole.
_reasons./admin: Per-user: session-gated content is a request-time dynamic hole.
_reasons./admin/usage: Per-user: session-gated telemetry report is a request-time dynamic hole.
_reasons./industry: Static landing — intro + example blueprint links, no request-time reads.
_reasons./industry/[id]: Per-blueprint planner ([id] param + cached structure/prices) streams from a dynamic hole; page chrome is the static shell.
_reasons./api/industry/blueprints: Blueprint search index is deploy-static SDE data (cached 'max', SDE-tag revalidated), so the handler prerenders to a static JSON asset — no per-request input.
_reasons.dynamic /api/*: Route handlers — per-request by nature (auth, mutations, DB queries, crons, external calls). Justified dynamic.
